description: Design system finding consolidation: hardcoded color values raised by code-reviewer (native) and design-system-agent (native). External reviewers (codex, gemini) also flag the token violations. Stage 1 and Stage 2 dedup merges near-identical findings. Tests correct raised_by[] attribution across native+external sources and severity reconciliation.

raw_findings.title: Hardcoded primary color #3B82F6 instead of design token
raw_findings.description: The Button component uses `color: '#3B82F6'` directly instead of `var(--color-primary)`. This bypasses the design token system and will not update when the theme changes.

raw_findings.title: Hardcoded hex color in Button bypasses design token
raw_findings.description: Button.tsx contains a hardcoded hex color value that should reference the design system token `--color-primary`. This pattern prevents consistent theming.

raw_findings.title: Focus ring uses hardcoded width and color, not focus token
raw_findings.description: The focus ring on Button uses `outline: '2px solid #2563EB'` instead of `var(--focus-ring)`. This violates WCAG 2.1 SC 2.4.11 (Focus Appearance) if token-based theming changes focus ring appearance for accessibility.

raw_findings.title: Button focus ring does not use focus token
raw_findings.description: The focus outline is hardcoded; accessibility-related design tokens must be referenced for consistent focus visibility across themes.

raw_findings.title: Button lacks variant prop for primary/secondary/ghost styles
raw_findings.description: The Button only implements a single visual style. A `variant` prop would let callers select primary, secondary, or ghost styles without duplicating the component.

findings.title: Focus ring uses hardcoded width and color, not focus token
findings.description: The focus ring on Button uses `outline: '2px solid #2563EB'` instead of `var(--focus-ring)`. This violates WCAG 2.1 SC 2.4.11 (Focus Appearance) if token-based theming changes focus ring appearance for accessibility.

findings.title: Hardcoded primary color #3B82F6 instead of design token
findings.description: The Button component uses `color: '#3B82F6'` directly instead of `var(--color-primary)`. This bypasses the design token system and will not update when the theme changes.

findings.title: Button lacks variant prop for primary/secondary/ghost styles
findings.description: The Button only implements a single visual style. A `variant` prop would let callers select primary, secondary, or ghost styles without duplicating the component.
findings._note: already at low (floor); no further demotion possible

consolidated_output.path_and_reason_header: Review path: multi-model (above-threshold diff; reviewers: 2 native + 2 external)

expected_judgement_notes: Consolidation is correct: (1) focus-ring finding merged from 2 reviewers; severity reconciled to high (max, 1-level diff); description from the higher-severity reviewer preserved; (2) hardcoded-color merged from design-system-agent + codex; both medium, unanimous; (3) variant-prop from code-reviewer only, already at low floor; (4) raised_by[] correctly attributed with native-team and external distinctions. No findings dropped.
